title: rule-categories-tagging
description:
Tag all existing rules with RuleCategory and regenerate golden files. From docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md.

Sections: §6.1, §6.2, §8 (Validation Tests)

Key deliverables:
- Add Category field to every rule across all pack files (~12 pack files)
  - Most rules: CategoryDestructive (default, majority of rules)
  - Privacy rules: personal.ssh, personal.files, macos.privacy (see Appendix)
  - Both rules: macos.system, macos.communication (see Appendix)
- CI category-count validation test against checked-in baseline (testdata/category-baseline.json)
- Registry validation test: every rule has non-zero Category
- Regenerate all golden files with new Category field in Match
- Unit tests for category assignments

References:
- Plan: docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md §6.1, §6.2, §8 (Validation Tests), Appendix
- Depends on: dcg-ovc.1 (foundation types and Pack.Rules rename)

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete. All 7 privacy rules, 18 both rules tagged per appendix. CI baseline validation test, registry non-zero category validation, and category assignment tests all pass. Golden files don't need regeneration (format excludes Match details). Branch: coder-2-fog/rule-categories-foundation. Ready for review.
